\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3510 introduces Energy Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{E}^{(n)}=\mathcal{E}^{(n)}_{\rm EM} + \rho\,(n_\mu u^\mu)^2 + p\,(n_\mu n^\mu + n_\mu u^\mu\,n_\nu u^\nu) + \dots \]
